name: Luscious Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, halves, broiler/fryer, boned and skinned
1 small red cabbage, sliced into thin strips
2 ½ cups Granny Smith apples, unpeeled, cubed
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Luscious Dressing:
------------------
1/3 cup balsamic vinegar
1/3 cup honey
1/4 cup olive oil
2 tablespoons Dijon mustard
Chicken:
--------
In a saute pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook, turning occasionally, about 10 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender. Remove the chicken; let it cool and cut into thin strips.
In a large bowl, mix together the chicken, cabbage, carrots, apples, celery, and walnuts.
Assembly:
---------
Place all of the dressing ingredients in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
Add the dressing to the salad mixture and toss lightly. Cover and chill for about 1 hour before serving. Arrange on plates; garnish with orange and kiwi slices.
